overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a scenic lakeshore. The character moves through shallow water, sandy beaches, and grassy wildflower areas with mountains visible in the distance under bright afternoon sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow lake shoreline with open water views

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through shallow water along the lakeshore with mountains visible ahead

entered.detail: calm shallow lake water reflecting the sky
mountain range visible across the lake
dense green trees lining the left shore
dense green trees lining the right shore

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through shallow lake water with an open view of the lake and distant mountains. The shoreline is lined with forests on both sides under a clear afternoon sky.

events.description: transitions from shallow water onto sandy beach
sun glare increases creating golden hour lighting effect

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking along the sandy shore with sunlight creating a bright glare

entered.detail: sandy beach along the water's edge
rocky outcroppings on the right side of the beach

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a sandy beach with rock formations on the right. The sun creates a strong glare as Geralt moves along the shore, and the surrounding forests draw closer.

events.description: moves from open beach into grassy area with wildflowers

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through tall grass and wildflowers including purple lupines and red poppies

entered.detail: tall green grass covering the ground
purple lupine flowers growing among the grass
red poppy flowers scattered in the grass

segments.scene_description: Geralt moves from the beach into a grassy area filled with purple and red wildflowers. The trees create partial overhead cover, diffusing the sunlight as the character walks through the vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: mixed shoreline with sand and shallow water

events.description: returns to shoreline with shallow water and open lake views

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking along the water's edge with the lake on the left and trees on the right

opposite shore of the lake with trees and structures

segments.scene_description: The scene opens back up to the shoreline with shallow water on the left and sandy beach underfoot. The opposite shore becomes visible in the distance as Geralt continues walking.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense lakeside vegetation with overhanging trees

events.description: enters denser vegetation area with taller grass and overhanging branches

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through dense vegetation and tall grass along the lake edge

entered.detail: thick bushes and undergrowth along the path
tree branches extending over the path from the right

segments.scene_description: Geralt enters a denser section of lakeside vegetation with tall grass, overhanging branches, and thick undergrowth. The lake remains visible to the left but the scene is more enclosed by surrounding foliage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a scenic lakeshore that shifts from wide-open vistas to enclosed, lush vegetation. It begins with Geralt wading through shallow lake water under a clear afternoon sky, with distant mountains framing the horizon between flanking forests. As he moves forward, the terrain transitions into a sandy beach where strong sunlight glares off the water and rock formations emerge on the right. The scene then shifts into a grassy meadow filled with purple and red wildflowers, where overhead tree cover diffuses the light before the view opens back up to a stretch of sandy shore and the distant opposite bank. Finally, the camera follows Geralt into a denser section of lakeside growth, where tall grass and overhanging branches enclose the path while the lake remains visible to the left.
